code.shareMessage: Hi, this is the link that will allow you to discover the world of {{siteName}} 🌸, now follow these simple steps: 1. Tap the button that says: Register 2. Fill in your details and create a Medium or Strong password. 3. After receiving the Pending Approval message or that your data was sent to the email, you must send your email to the person who shared the registration link so they can inform us and you can be approved.
